We have a very stubborn almost 2 year old lab/boxer mix that loves to pull on walks. This calmed her down instantly. She's no longer combatively pulling when we walk her and she does great! Took some getting used to for her, but this works like a charm.

Needed something as my pup has all of the sudden started getting frightened in the car and keeps trying to get on my lap. She's not a lap dog so this is quite dangerous. It works very well. It attaches to your child seat anchors on the back of the seat of in the crevice of the seat and the other end to your harness. We have a ruff wear harness that is very good so she stays put nicely.

Nothing special about this thong, more comfy than other thongs, for sure. It seems like it was simply cut from a cloth and then.... Voila! There were no stitchings around the band. Well, that's prob why it's 'invisible' because of no bulk. I like it though.

Anyone with knowledge of Anne and Mary Boleyn and their relationships with Henry VIII will see that this is tabloid fiction, pure and simple. The timetables and events are total fabrications. Yes, Anne was alleged to have had relationships with her brother. But to see this depicted as fact in this movie? Well, just look at the costumes. I've seen better costumes on sale at the Halloween store. No one making this movie was interested in the facts. Anne, Mary, Henry, Katherine, how could they not be rolling in their graves? The accounts are there. I'm sorry that some people will actually believe that this is the way that it was. Books. Go read some books. Books are good.
Got this to connect my antenna to two TVs. The short cables are super convenient for tight spaces behind my entertainment center. Works great with zero signal loss.
They work well as part of the process of cleaning cleaning my shotgun. Convenien and efficient when used.
Fantastic way to hide litter boxes. Looks great and easy to assemble. Also easy to clean. Cat approved.
Bought this for my daughter's first birthday. The songs aren't too loud or annoying, and the fur is super soft. She carries it everywhere.

K'wan just doesn't miss. I went into Street Dreams expecting a solid hood tale, and it blew those expectations clean out the water. The way Rio evolves from a small-time hustler into something way bigger felt earned, not rushed. Prince is the kind of mentor figure who makes you nervous and excited at the same time, every scene with him crackles. What got me was how real the dialogue sounds; I could hear these conversations happening on my own block. The pacing is relentless too. I kept telling myself "one more chapter" and suddenly it was 3 a.m. If you love raw street lit with actual depth and characters that stick with you, this one delivers. Easily my favorite K'wan book so far.

Pretty nice, affordable watch from Adidas. I use this while I'm coaching soccer and I like that it isn't too bulky, not bothered by sweat and easy to read. The stopwatch function is easy to use and find and works great for my purposes. I'm not overly wild about this weird blue color, but other than that the watch is top notch.

Bought this because I thought it was time to upgrade my old Harmony One. The physical Harmony Home remote is fantastic. I love the simple design, love the fact that you can program buttons to do two different things depending on if you long press or short press. Love that it's RF. If Logitech threw an LCD and backlight on this thing, it would be the best remote they've ever created. Where the problems begin is there's no LCD on the remote. Your smartphone is supposed to take on that task and unfortunately, the app that makes this possible just sucks. Sometimes it's slow to connect to the hub, sometimes it crashes, sometimes the hub just stops responding to it. More often than not, I would grab the OEM remotes because it was so much faster and less frustrating. That's not a good sign. I actually managed to put up with the app for a while, but the thing that had me running back to my Harmony One was when something gets out of sync (happens more than you think), there's no "help" button on the remote. I had to dig my phone out, unlock it, launch the app, wait for it to find the hub, hope the app doesn't crash, then fix the sync problem. This would take me 2 seconds to fix with my old Harmony One. With Harmony Home, it takes a good minute. I don't like the direction Logitech is going with the smartphone thing. They need to focus on making good physical remotes. Does anyone really enjoy using their smartphone as remote? It's clumsy and takes too long to do anything with. I cringed every time I needed to launch the Harmony app to do something. I need tactile buttons Logitech!

I just put these wheels on my samsonite suitcase so I can't really comment on quality of this product. It has yet to go through the test. What I can say is wheels came very fast, like the next day. The measurements I took of the wheels and what I received were right on. I had to hacksaw rivets and used given hardware to reattach wheels to case. Hardware that came with wheels were right on. I have no reason to think these wheels would fail anytime soon. Can't give it a 5 star yet.
This is a very nice little case and I love the owls!

Been using this for about three weeks now and I'm genuinely surprised by how much I rely on it already. Battery lasts me a solid four days before needing a charge, and the heart rate tracking seems accurate compared to my old chest strap. Syncs to my phone without any hiccups. The display is crisp enough to read in direct sunlight, which was a dealbreaker for me. Refurbished unit came looking brand new with no scratches or marks anywhere. For the price, honestly can't complain. Would buy again without hesitation.
I am a huge fan of the whole series, they make for and excellent short read and have very unique ideas and concepts.

Got these in the iridescent black and they are gorgeous in person! The shimmer is unreal and I've gotten tons of compliments. For the price, you really can't beat the quality, they look like designer shoes. Fit true to size for me and surprisingly comfy for a heel. Totally worth every penny.
These mats have held up beautifully after six months of washes, still plush and no fraying anywhere.

I really loved how the author balanced the intense firehouse scenes with the quieter personal moments between the two main characters. The dispatch side of things felt authentic and added a layer I haven't seen in other romance books. The humor kept it from getting too heavy. Picked it up on a whim and finished it in one weekend. Would definitely read more from this writer.

This is your typical cheap, made-in-China-esque product. That's fine, but it wasn't.99 - it was what, $6? I got it for evening walks with my dog and at first, I was really happy with it. It sheds a nice blue light and allows her to see where she's walking and, more importantly, allows passing cars to see both of us! It attached nicely to her collar. Even before the clasp broke (in literally fewer than 10 uses), there were a couple issues--the light itself is very hard to turn on. I pressed both sides as hard as I could, and I ended up having to hit it against a wall to get the thing to turn on. Also, the clasp is difficult to get on a squirming dog. You'd think it would easily collapse so that you could slip it onto the collar...I don't want my dog wearing it all the time (just one more thing on her collar to jingle/get caught/etc.). But it's a hassle to get on. And yet, it broke after only a few uses! All in all, not worth the money. It's a good idea, just poorly made.

Got these for everyday wear and they're perfect for that. Super lightweight and the canvas breaks in after a day or two. I'd recommend them to anyone wanting simple slip-ons for running errands or casual Fridays. Not heavy-duty hiking gear obviously, but for the price and the comfort level, these are solid. My sister loved mine so much she ordered a pair too.

I really loved this toy set! The mixed-pattern bricks kept my kids engaged all day long, they were so excited to build different designs. One thing that stood out was how compact they are; it's perfect for small spaces. A bit pricey, but the quality is top-notch and worth every penny.
It is nice to have some color to add to my wardrobe. Comfortable fit, just like the one that came with my Fitbit flex 2.
The knives don't work well as steak knives. The serrated blade tears apart whatever you try to cut, rather than slicing. Throwing them out.

Love how easy these are to wipe clean after messy prep work. The measurements printed right on the surface have been super handy for rolling out dough. Stays firmly planted on my granite without any curling at the corners.
Great price on this grinder and the case is fabulous. Came with some nice accessories.
Excellent! Works great, packaged well. If you're looking for an inexpensive nail clipper, this is the one.
Smells amazing! My dog loves these treats and they are the perfect size for training, and for small dogs.

I got huge value for this jacket after checking a few other options. The material feels great and it holds up well over time. Compared to similar styles I've seen, the price is absolutely worth it, especially since it's a solid light weight with plenty of room. The color change just came as planned, and it fits perfectly without needing extra sizes. Overall, I'm really happy with this purchase and would recommend it if you're looking for quality at a reasonable cost.

It's a nice enough story, but it's just a story. A really simple story presumably for beginner readers. It took me 2 minutes to read the whole book. Each page has no more than a paragraph of large text and the adjoining page has a black and white illustration. I think the illustrations are the star of the book and probably why so many people enthuse over it. But really, there's no moral, no point, and it doesn't even make sense (how is Ferdinand the biggest and strongest bull when literally all he ever does is sit and smell flowers?) I know it's a work for children, so I wasn't expecting much, but I was disappointed at how simple and pointless the work seems. I was expecting a book for around 4th-6th grade, not a black and white picture book. Meh. 2 stars. This review originally appeared at [...]reading-challenge-2016-story-of.html as part of the Reading Challenge 2016.

I've had these mitts for about eight months now, and they've held up way better than I expected. I use them almost daily, pulling heavy cast iron out of a 500 oven, handling grill grates, you name it, and there's zero thinning or scorching on the palms. The stitching around the edges hasn't frayed at all, even after multiple runs through the washing machine. I was worried the silicone grip would peel or get gummy over time, but it looks practically new. They're also long enough that I never accidentally brush my forearm on a hot rack, which used to happen constantly with my old square potholders. Honestly, for something so simple, the build quality is impressive. No complaints.

This was a decent retelling but didn't fully grab me. The Edinburgh setting is nicely done and some of the party scenes feel authentic and lively. My main issue was that Cat just didn't hold my attention as a protagonist. She comes across as a bit shallow and I never really connected with her storyline. The writing itself is solid and there are definitely entertaining moments scattered throughout. Finished it in a few days but honestly expected more. Fine for a light weekend read but not something I'd rush to recommend to friends.
Way deeper than I expected. Couldn't put it down once I started reading.

The shoes are beautiful and soft as indicated, but are somewhat narrow in the area across the front of the shoe where the colorful part of the shoe joins with the black part of the shoe creating a pinch on both sides of the foot. And after couple hours wear it is difficult standing flat on the foot. You would have to walk somewhat on the side of the foot to ease the pain.
Box was totally crushed and the straps looked scuffed right out of the bag.

The box arrived a bit scuffed, but the docker itself was wrapped snugly and arrived in perfect shape. First impression: it's surprisingly hefty and wide, definitely built for big pies. A little awkward to tuck into my gadget drawer, but it does the job smoothly and feels well-made.
The lid seal popped off after three uses and never stayed on again.
Did not expect this table to be this nice, Thanks

I've been reading this series since book one and honestly, I wasn't sure if Stephanie Plum could still keep me entertained fourteen books in. But somehow Evanovich pulls it off. The Lula scenes alone had me laughing out loud on my commute. The love triangle stuff is familiar territory but still fun, and the bounty hunting disasters never get old. Grabbed this at the airport and finished it in two days. If you've stuck with the series this long, you won't be let down. Pure comfort reading.
The colors of this scarf are beautiful. I love it.
This movie was good. They are talented dancers. The dance sequences could be better and more thorough. It is fairly consistent with Center Stage yet I prefer this ones filming.

I picked these up hoping they'd handle a slightly thicker HDMI run, and they're just a touch snug for that. Still, they hold everything securely and haven't budged once. For standard cables they'd be perfect. Honestly, they do the job better than I expected for the cost. No regrets.

This case looks solid and looks great under my desk setup. I especially appreciated how easy it was to remove the top panel, no hassle at all. The modular power supply worked well too; saving wiring time really paid off. One thing that could be better is smoothing out the edges of the hard drive cage, but overall it's a solid pick for anyone who values portability and customization. The CPU heat sink space was plenty, and the front fan did an impressive job keeping things cool. It's definitely worth the upgrade if you want more control over your build.
Fell apart after one wear. Total waste of money.
Perfect for casual restraint play, these hold up great with a little care. I'd recommend them to any beginner looking for reliable gear.

My cats gave this product a sniff and moved on. I placed the catnip in the bloom part and positioned it in the CENTER of their play area. They skirted around it. It sat there for a week. I moved it next to their ball pit which they love hoping it would engage them. The ignored it. The only attention it has gotten was from the dog who peed on it.:l It is very small, only a kitten would fir on this with any comfort. It doesn't feel comfortable at all, The padding is thin. I tried to give it to the gunie pig who was about as interested as the cats. Really just a piece of plastic for highly bored felines, if that.

I just got this and it exceeded my expectations. The fit is perfect, and the blade feels solid without being overly heavy. I love how sleek it looks and the extra features make it really useful for on-the-go use. It's light enough to stay in my pocket but still functional. Every time someone asks about it, they're impressed. The overall experience was great, definitely a standout in its class.
I had my doubts about this but it work out. I left this unit out on my desk and two other people wanted to take it.

I went in with low expectations after all the negative buzz, but I figured Johnny Depp and a western might still be fun. It's not as bad as some say, but it also never really finds its footing. The action set pieces are over-the-top in a way that feels more chaotic than exciting, and the tone swings wildly between goofy comedy and darker violence. Depp's Tonto is quirky, but the shtick gets old fast. Armie Hammer is fine, just bland. It's watchable if you're in the mood for something loud and brainless, but it drags on way too long and didn't leave me wanting a rewatch.
The Kind of Law Enforcement People Love. Chuck Norris in the Role of a Sheriff who Protects the People from harm. This is classic TV. If you like Chuck Norris - this series is for you.
Loved this set, it's perfect for my cooking needs. Highly recommended!

This timer looks great on the surface, but it's really not worth the money. It broke after just a few days and I had to buy another one for half the price. The value doesn't match the cost, I should've stayed with something simpler. A little cheaper is better if you're looking for this kind of thing.

Honestly didn't expect much for the price, but this little controller has been a pleasant surprise. Hooked it up to my pool pump and it's handled the load without breaking a sweat. The scheduling options are more flexible than I thought I'd get at this tier. Programming took maybe five minutes. Way better than the mechanical timer it replaced. No complaints so far.

Ordered this for my Kindle and it downloaded instantly with zero issues. The cover art looks fantastic on my Paperwhite, really crisp and colorful, which caught my eye right away. I was a bit worried about formatting since some indie titles have weird spacing problems, but everything rendered perfectly. No weird line breaks or missing chapters. As for the actual story, I binged the whole thing in one sitting. Miles and Hank have such great chemistry together, and the kid character genuinely made me laugh out loud a few times. The goddess subplot threw me for a loop in the best way possible. Picked up book one right after finishing this one because I needed more context. Already pre-ordered the next installment. Solid purchase all around.
This stinks but it is cute, roomy, folds flat (which I love), and is overall a great lunch bag.

It is beyond me how this got so many good reviews. If you like porn you will not like this. If you do not like porn you will not like this. There is no magic between any of the actors. Wait, they aren't actors, they're all lousy. The story line is full of contradictions. Nothing works! I wish I had read the bad reviews before ever purchasing this.
Thought these would feel flimsy for the price but they're actually solid metal. Mounting took five minutes and the spring bar holds rolls way better than I expected. Really happy with the upgrade.

Took these on a week-long hiking trip through the Smokies and they held up great, even after getting knocked around in my pack. The resealable pouch kept everything fresh despite damp mornings. Still going strong after multiple uses, so I'm impressed with the longevity.

This cross is simple but elegant and just the right size for me! Very well made and will last a long time plus you can use it on different length chains since the bale is not teeny tiny and will accommodate other chains easily.

I have an Iphone 5 and this holder is fantastic. It fits my phone perfectly and very snug with no wobbling or movement at all. Maybe I am an odd duck, but i wear this on my forearm facing the inside. I like the access to my phone it provides without having to twist and squirm to get it off my bicep when I am running (skipping songs, etc). The sizing seems correct. My forearm is 12" around and it fits snug but is not constricting. It seems to be very well made with good stitching and a nice, comfortable padding on the back. The fabric wicks moisture as it is supposed to and is very cool feeling. When I am traveling and running, I just slide my room key in there too. It is perfect as far as I am concerned and had exceeded my expectations.
Valerius gotta love him. I just really like this book. I really like the storyline, I like the background information we got on Ash and Co. Good reading and love the mythos of this series.

Swapped out all our old bedroom knobs for these last month. The weight is surprising in a good way and they don't wobble after installation. Definitely recommend to anyone updating an older home without spending a fortune.
Not my favorite installment, but still a solid read. I'd definitely recommend this to anyone who's been following the series from the beginning.

Started this with high hopes but ended up skimming the last hundred pages. The world-building felt cluttered and the romance dynamics made me uncomfortable throughout. Just couldn't get invested in any of it.

The box was a bit too small but the phone arrived safely. The packaging felt solid and organized, great for that kind of purchase. It wasn't perfect, but it got the job done in one go. A solid value if you're okay with a compact design.
Grisham seems to always produce a good read and makes you a part of the ride. Highly enjoyable and recommend to all.
Works great for my nano tank, just wish it came with suction cups to keep it steady in the reservoir.

Nice material, but isn't all that practical to me. I reverted back to squashing garlic with my knife to peel and manually chopping it. Other times I just use my food processor for bulk garlic and mason jar storage.
Honestly didn't think a collar would make much difference, but my pit mix stopped scratching completely. Way better than the stiff nylon ones I've bought before.
I bought this for my 8 year old for Christmas. He really had a great time building it with his dad and loves flinging things all over the house. He also had a great time painting his!
These cords fixed the flickering I was dealing with on my second screen. Picture is super crisp now and everything just feels snappier. Definitely picking up a few more for my desk setup.

Arrived two days early in a neat zip bag, no weird smells or wrinkles. Slipped it on right out of the package and the fabric feels substantial without being stiff. Already ordered the tan color too because I love it that much.
I had doubts with this set but purchased it based on the other reviews being positive. I am so happy I did get this, it works great! The darts actually stick and this is a fun set for kids.
It's good for my 6 1/2 year old. it's good day and night! Good quality product.
Great learning puzzle. My 3 and a half year old loves it. Still needs assistance but does pretty good by himself too.

Bought this about eight months ago and it's been solid for everyday use. Opens cans smoothly without much effort. The only minor complaint is the handle could be a bit more comfortable for larger hands. Overall though, really happy with this purchase and would buy again.
Arrived super fast in perfect foam packaging. Popped them in and my bathroom feels like a clean, bright studio now.
Arrived quickly and packed super secure. Bigger than I expected and looks awesome on my kid's desk.

Bought this for my mom's birthday and it turned into the whole family's favorite thing. Setup was a breeze, just loaded a memory card with a bunch of old and new pics and popped it in. I'd absolutely suggest this for anyone gifting to grandparents or non-techy relatives because once it's running, there's zero fuss. The slideshow transitions are smooth and the screen quality is crisp enough that even my picky dad commented on it. Now my mom leaves it on in the kitchen and gets little surprises throughout the day. If you want a thoughtful, low-maintenance gift that keeps giving, this is it.

Apparently, from the reviews and images posted for this product, not everyone is receiving the same product. I received two "Crucial Vacuum" branded filters when I ordered this item (Bissell HEPA Media Filter, 32076). As noted in the review of the Crucial filters, Bissell Style 7, Style 9 HEPA Media Filter; Compare to Bissell Part#32076, these filters are notably short (~1.8mm). Numerically, this may seem like a small difference in tolerances, but it allows a significant amount of air leakage through these gaps.
Very fun and simple to build because there in no inner frame
For the price, you can't beat this thing. Keeps my kids active and entertained for hours.

My order arrived way faster than expected and was packed really securely, no leaks or dents at all. First impression right out of the box: the bottle is sturdy and the instructions are super clear, which I appreciated. I could tell immediately this wasn't some watered-down gimmick. Tried it on a stubborn spot near the back door and the difference was noticeable right away. Honestly impressed before I'd even finished applying it.

The first alien movie was great but the others we kind of tiresome and kind of did not live up to the franchise potential. This movie is spectacularly made: great story, gat actors and wonderful special effects. Really worth watching. It kind of explains some stuff in the alien movie but other reveiwers have a lady discussed that at length.
My favorite feature of LED lights is that the instant you turn them on, they're already at full brightness. No waiting around. Plus they use less energy!
This one's great, super organized and everything fits perfectly. Love how easy it is to unpack!
Can't beat the price for something this well-made and nice looking.
The novel kept me hooked with its fresh twist. Loved how it held attention throughout.
SIZE IS NOT ACCURED, YOU NEED TO EXPLAIN THE BUYERS THAT IF YOU ARE SIZE 10, YOU NEED TO ORDER SIZE 11 AND WIDE, BECAUSE I HAVE NORMAL FEET AND THIS DID NOT FIT ME AT ALL.

First pair of Crocs I have ever owned. And I must say that I really like them. Love how the little nubbs on the sole make me feet feel. Like getting a little foot massage everytime I wear them. Just passing this info on. Really like the shoes.

I started watching this after finishing my last binge and honestly didn't expect much from a show about cancer. But Laura Linney is absolutely incredible here. She brings this perfect balance of humor and real emotion that makes the heavy stuff bearable without feeling forced. The way her character handles the diagnosis with this dark, sarcastic humor really resonated with me. My one complaint is that some of the supporting characters feel a bit underdeveloped in season one, especially her son who comes across as annoyingly oblivious most of the time. I also wish the episodes were longer because each one ends right when I'm getting invested. Overall though, it's a solid watch. Not as depressing as you'd think, and Linney alone makes it worth the purchase.

I wanted to like these jeans, especially since I couldn't find my usual go-to brand locally anymore. The price seemed reasonable at first glance, but after a couple months of regular wear, I'm disappointed. The fabric feels thinner than expected and started pilling around the thighs way too soon. The fit is okay out of the bag but stretches out oddly by midday, leaving them saggy in the seat. Stitching on a back pocket already started unraveling after maybe ten washes. For what I paid, I was hoping for at least a year of decent wear, not something that looks beat up this fast. You're basically paying for the name without the durability to back it up.

This book really stood out to me. I was surprised by how solid it feels and lasts through regular reading. The information is thorough without being overwhelming, and the design makes it easy to handle even when I've been using it for weeks. It's a great mix of science and practical tips that keeps my interest high. I appreciated learning about hormonal changes and weight differences with such clear explanations. A solid investment if you're curious about women's health details. Five stars for both content and build quality!

Ansel has always had a crush on Juniper. Ansel tormented Juniper so much that she hated him. Juniper is attacked and bitten by a werewolf and is turning her into one herself. Ansel and Juniper have three days to find the werewolf who bit her and kill it. I loved the story line and plot. This book has twist and turns. I couldn't put it down. I received a copy of this book in exchange for an honest review.

I was using a competitor but switched to this to see. The way it was shipped was worth sticking with this. I have had other companies bottles leak everywhere or be slightly damaged. First bottle here was great. It's working well and my dog loves it. I don't notice a fishy smell but if there was he would love it even more.

I originally bought these glasses on June 29th, 2016. At the time, I thought these were outstanding glasses and rated 5 stars. Today, August 7th, 2017, one of the Bormioli Rocco glasses exploded spontaneously inside the dishwasher while it was OFF. The glass was dirty and I was waiting to get more dishes to run the dishwasher. I'm totally surprised that this happened. I'm lucky that it exploded while inside the dishwasher (minimizing broken glass all over). I don't think I will buy these glasses again as EXPLODING GLASSES are too dangerous to have around my family. ==== I just read other reviews of customers claiming these glasses also exploded on them.. I had no injuries but many others did. Do not buy them unless you want to risk yourself and your loved ones with them.
Not bad for the price, feels a bit flimsy but honestly protects better than I expected for daily use.

I really loved getting this package, it arrived in perfect condition with everything neatly packed. The shipping felt solid, and I was impressed by how quickly I got it. From day one, the jacket is super comfortable and stays warm even when wearing other layers. It definitely stood out as a top choice for the season.

This one really stood out to me. The build quality is top-notch and everything fits perfectly. My kids both love using it, my son can organize his toys on his own, and my daughter enjoys having the books handy too. Definitely worth getting if you want a smart storage solution for little hands. Highly recommend!

I really loved this set after finishing it on a budget. It's more affordable than similar options while still delivering solid content for young learners. The stories are engaging and the visuals clear, perfect for keeping kids interested. Each episode feels like a mini-movie, making learning feel fun. I'm impressed with how much value I got for the price, especially considering the quality and variety. It's definitely worth every penny if you're looking for a solid introduction to reading basics.
This one really held up through a few show runs. Perfect for long play sessions. Highly recommend!

I grabbed this on a whim expecting one of those generic brooding male lead stories that all blend together after a while. Boy was I wrong. Micah starts off seriously unlikable and I almost DNF'd around chapter three, but something about the way the author peels back his layers kept me hooked. The side characters actually have real opinions about him instead of just propping him up, which made the whole thing feel grounded. By the halfway point I was completely invested. The pacing is solid too, no dragged out misunderstandings just to fill pages. I stayed up way too late finishing it and immediately checked if there's a sequel. If you're tired of the same old formula give this a shot. Way better than I anticipated.

Got this bag it has been working great. it is the perfect size for a 15in laptop with a notebook and a laptop power cable. It has a different material on the bottom of the bag which is great as it will not get scratched. I use the Metro rail and bus system to get to work and this is a great bag.

My son wears size 18 month clothing, and size 5.5 shoe and we bought the 2T-3T. They fit good, but are pretty tight on the ankle. They are also a lot thinner than I was expecting, so not super great for winter.

This book hit me right in the gut. The part where the author breaks down how to reframe negative self-talk into actionable steps? Absolute gold. I've read plenty of self-help stuff that feels like fluffy inspiration, but this one gave me a practical framework I could actually use the next day. The chapter on "micro-wins" alone changed how I approach my mornings. It's not about toxic positivity or pretending everything's fine, it's about building quiet, stubborn confidence from scratch. I dog-eared so many pages my copy looks wrecked. If you've ever felt like you're just background noise in your own life, this is the reset button you didn't know you needed.

I do not like to wear under ware so taught I would purchase these and pray they are comfortable, well they are most certainly comfortable to the point you forget you have them on. I am curvy and they fit me perfect. I will be buying more in the different styles
We've read this every December for four years and it's held up perfectly, no loose pages, spine still tight. The kids spill cocoa on it constantly but it wipes clean.

I really loved this respirator after trying a few others, it fits snug without any gaps and feels like a real head fit. The filters made breathing so much easier, and I didn't have to strain at all. It's comfortable enough for long workdays but still keeps me safe when the situation gets tense. Definitely recommend it if you need reliable protection and comfort. Perfect for anyone who values safety without sacrificing style.

Picked up this used copy for about four bucks, which felt like a fair deal. Theroux's train journey across China in the eighties is definitely interesting if you're into travel writing, but honestly the guy's attitude wore me down after a while. He comes across as pretty grumpy and judgmental toward almost everyone he meets. Some of his observations about the country's transformation are sharp, but he spends way too much time complaining about bad tea and uncomfortable sleeping cars. I kept reading because the historical snapshot is genuinely valuable, especially seeing China right before everything exploded economically. Just wish he'd focused less on his own misery. For the price I paid I can't complain too much, but I wouldn't shell out full retail for it.

Tiny and adorable. They do have trouble sitting up, which can be frustrating for little hands, but the issue isn't big enough to complain about. I purchased these, along with 4 other sets, and the matching monster high mini case for my 5 year old, and her 8 and 10 year old sisters were left jealous. So there's definitely a very large age range of interest in these figures.

I grabbed this mainly for long hikes and it's been solid for keeping water chilled way past lunch. The mouthpiece design keeps ice from jamming up, though you do have to push the cap aside with your thumb, minor hassle but not a dealbreaker. If you're someone who hates lukewarm sips on a trail or at a picnic, I'd easily recommend it. Perfect for casual day-trippers who prioritize cold drinks over a totally hands-free lid.
I expected a light read but got so much more, truly moving and surprisingly thoughtful.

As my former bugout bag (45L, no frame S&W tactical pack, which I truly love) hath recently runneth over, I was in the market for a larger, molle compatible pack with an internal frame. When I was offered this pack at a discount in exchange for my honest opinion, I jumped at it. This is my third bag from Gonex, but the first one that doesn't fold up into its own pocket. I was impressed with the heavy duty 900D nylon and the quality construction throughout. The shoulders, waist belt and back are nicely padded. The molle attachments on top, back and sides allow the bag to be configured in various ways by adding molle compatible pouches, and there are straps on top and bottom for carryig sleeping bags, tents etc. My favorite features: - included, attached rain cover (this is in the semi hidden very bottom pocket, zipper next to the lumbar padding). I also like that the rain cover on the desert camo pack is a solid tan. When deployed, the pack looks more 'weekend getaway' and less 'SHTF' with the solid cover. - pockets in the waist belt. They aren't huge, but will fit small items like a wallet, phone or power bars. - the zipper runs the full length of the main compartment, giving easy access to everything - there are 5 pockets on the inside of the main compartment flap; 1 zippered, 2 velcro and 1 open mesh - 3 position height adjustment - water bottle/ snack pockets on the sides - molle attachments everywhere! My minor quibble: - the lining and cover are a slightly different color (more yellow) than the tan in the camo. Not a huge deal, but I would have liked it to match. Overall, this is an excellent pack that is worth the price.
This jacket really held up during my morning run, it's super warm and keeps me comfortable. The fabric is soft but sturdy enough for outdoor use. Great value for the price!
Thought these might feel stiff like the ones from the local store, but they're super comfortable right out of the package. My husband refuses to wear anything else now.
For under twenty bucks, this little light is a beast. I clip it on my vest for pre-dawn runs and it's shockingly bright.

Been using these for about six months now and they hold up really well. I swim and shower with mine daily, and unlike the stock band that started cracking around month three, these show zero signs of wear. The clasp mechanism feels secure and I haven't had one pop off yet. Knocked off a star because the color faded slightly from sun exposure. Still, for the price you really can't complain about the quality.

Bought this for my wife who's always fighting for outlets at coffee shops and airports. The swivel plug is genius, lets it sit flat against the wall no matter which way the outlet is oriented, so cords aren't sticking out everywhere. I was worried it'd feel cheap given the price but it's solidly built with a nice grippy texture. Takes up basically zero room in my laptop bag. We've used it at hotels where there's only one accessible outlet and it saved us from arguing over who gets to charge first. Honestly anyone who travels or works remotely should grab one. No regrets at all.

First impressions are that this computer is FAST. I mainly use this web browsing, and the speed is 10x faster than my old laptop (which was a cheaper $250 version). Opened multiple tabs at once - no issues. Netflix is WAY faster than my old computer too. I have not tried word processing, etc, but I'm sure it will be fine. Google apps are easy to browse/find. I would recommend this to anyone, especially as it is much cheaper than any other option. Update: after about a week, I'm still very pleased with this Chromebook. As some reviewers have said, the display is not that great for watching Netflix (it still streams faster than my previous laptop), but is perfect for web browsing etc. Also, I use a Nike running (GPS) watch that I tried to connect to the Chromebook, but found out there is no app for it:>( But for me, the price, speed, (and hopefully) longevity is worth it.
Arrived next day in secure retail packaging. Cables feel sturdy with tight-fitting connectors. Charged my LG fast right out of the box. Very happy with this purchase.
This shoe really stands out for its quality at such a low price. Perfect fit and comfortable, definitely worth every penny.

I bought this cage for my Holland lop. Fantastic size for him with lots of extra room for him to play. The only negative I have is the bottom of the cage has a raised square textured patturn that makes it very difficult to clean out messes - especially urine. Other than that - this cage is superior than most I have ever used.

This held my attention from start to finish. I want to go back and chew through all the information again. Riveting. Reading from this perspective is interesting, my pop was at Pearl Harbor when it was bombed. I grew up hearing things from the American perspective. Sigh.

Looked to be good quality- bought it for the good price too- just needed one (for a missing one) but got two just in case. It was to short and did not make contact in order to turn the light bulb on- I tried modifying both to make them work- no luck, so needing to buy the same adapter from a different maker at this point. I ruined the ones I got but I suppose that's okay- they are cheap. Just wish I had read the other 1 star reviews then I would have known this adapter wouldn't work for me either.

There is not a book Lindsay Buroker has written that is anything less than fantastic in my opinion. Her ability to write fast, get books done quickly but stay true to her writing style, characters and plot amazes me. I have such a fondness for the Emperor's Edge universe as that's where my love of Buroker started off, so I was thrilled to get a series in the same universe only now we get to see Nurians and 'mental sciences' plaging a big role. This book didn't disappoint. While I miss Amaranthe's snark and Sicarius'...Sicariusness, I have to say that the characters are very well written, the plot engaging and the tidbits that mention EE great! I will read everything and anything you write!
Smells great, and the fine mist dries quickly. My favorite.
Great built it lasted weeks without issue. Super reliable performance.
Great toilet seat. Easy to clean and silent when dropped! What more can you ask for in a toilet seat???

Bought this for my 10 year old's birthday and he's been having a blast with it. The suspension on this thing is surprisingly good - it handles the bumps and rocks in our backyard like a champ without getting stuck. Battery life is decent, maybe 25 minutes of solid run time before it needs a recharge. My only real complaint is the steering feels a little loose at higher speeds, like it drifts a bit when you're trying to corner sharp. Not a dealbreaker but takes some getting used to. The body is well made and has survived several crashes into our fence already without a scratch. Overall a solid RC for the price. Would definitely recommend for kids who are just getting into remote control cars.

Bought this for my 8-year-old daughter who's been begging to try archery, and honestly for the price I wasn't expecting much, but wow, it's a steal. The bow feels sturdy, not like a cheap toy, and the arrows have held up to some pretty rough misses into the fence. She picked up the basics way faster than I thought she would. The adjustable draw weight is perfect because her older cousin can use it too without us buying a second setup. We've already spent hours in the backyard with it and it's held up great. If you're on the fence about getting your kid into shooting, this is a no-brainer for the cost.

George takes his big city bride, Madeline, to meet the family in North Carolina. There's Meg, his mom, who's suspicious of this polished, too thin woman introduced into the family. The brother exudes resentment towards George and slumps sullenly through the film. His wife, girlishly fawns over Madeline, and gushes about her own pregnancy while excusing her sullen husband's churlishness. The father quietly goes about his woodworking and lets the action play out. Along with this family scenario, Madeline seeks out a backwoods artist to sign for her gallery. This creates a conflict when a crisis in the pregnancy draws the family together, while Madeline tends to business. The film is marred by too many scenes with low lighting make the viewer guess what's going on with whom. Additionally many scenes are muttered through and possibly key information gets missed. At first I thought Madeline was the focus of the film, but the other daughter-in-law captures the attention through the majority of the film. Interesting family, but not as satisfying as it could have been.

I love this hat. The styling is super cute, especially with the bow at the back. It seemed to fit about the same as most standard ladies hats of this type, possibly a little looser as I have a big head and tend to find most hats slightly small until they have been broken in and stretched. This fit well from the get-go. There is a slight amount of adjustability (there's a velcro closure by the bow on the back) but not much. The construction on it is solid and seems like it will hold up to a lot of wear - already been through the wash once after being thrown in a mud puddle and stepped on by my toddler, and it still looks good as new. I purchased the dark violet color - it's definitely not violet, more of a light tweedy brown - BUT it is the exact color that it shows on the computer screen. So ignore the words and go off of the picture:) Huge brim is great for the beach, reading, gardening, or just everyday wear to protect your face from the sun. Please note, the brim does NOT extend all the way around the back. It almost gives this hat more of a bonnet look than the oversized sun hats one often thinks of. I think this gives it more style, but if you're looking for something to also protect the back of your neck, this is not the hat for you. I love this hat and will be getting a lot of use out of it this summer! I received this product for free or at a discount in exchange for my honest review. All opinions are my own and did not affect the purchase price.
This book really puts everything you experience behind the scenes to life. It feels authentic and well-written at a great price. Highly recommend it!

Got this kit for some minor phone and tablet repairs around the house. Most of the bits fit well and the magnetic driver holds screws without much fuss. The variety is decent for the price, and I was able to swap out a battery and replace a cracked screen without stripping anything. That said, the build quality is pretty mid. The tweezers feel flimsy and bent slightly on first use, and the flex shaft extension wobbles more than I'd like. The case does the job but feels cheap when you carry it. It's fine for occasional DIY stuff, but I wouldn't rely on it daily. For what I paid, it gets the job done, just don't expect premium.

I'm a 32F, but usually find that most 32DDD's will fit me more comfortably. That said, I thought this bra would be a winner. They offered my size, and it's such a cute bra (a hard find for sizes D & up). Unfortunately, if you are like me, this bra will absolutely not fit you. The 32DDD is more of a 32 C or D. Especially with all the padding. When it arrived, I took one look at it and knew it was a dream best to be forgotten. Other bras in this size that I bought fit me fine- the Wacoal 32DDD was perfect, but this one particular bra was just so outrageously the wrong size that I want to warn other women: If you are a 32D or up, this bra is not for you, no matter what the sizes say.

Terry Pratchett is just about my favorite author. I'm not familiar with Neil Gaiman. They make a wonderful team. Terry is a brilliant satirist and his characters invariably involve other realities and species. Yes it is another book about the struggle between good and evil yet in this version you get to poke fun at all of it. Full of surprising twists, in typical Pratchett form, he will keep you reading way past your bedtime.

I have two pre-teen girls in the neighborhood who go crazy over the Mini Lalaloopsy - Great hand toy for little fingers and growing minds. I always give these out as Christmas gifts to the neighborhood children, who are less fortunate. I often ask the children there Christmas wish in October and it always surprises me that this is the number one toy they request... Found these during one of Amazons special deal of the day it was a great price could not pass them up.....

The box set arrived two days early in a sturdy cardboard mailer, no dents or loose discs at all. Popped the first one in right away and the picture quality really surprised me, clean and sharp for an older show. That classic theme song hit and I was grinning like a kid again. Zorro's charm and the lighthearted tone hold up beautifully. Already halfway through season one.
Love it! Flying helicopters are so much fun. My cat loves it too. I attach a little string and a toy to it and fly it around the room for my kitty to chase.
For the price, these are surprisingly well-made. Fit perfectly and look way more expensive than they were.

The fit is more or less fine, though the lack of choices for inseam sucks. The drawstring legs are useless, and beyond stupid. I just jerked out the drawstrings and cuffed the legs for now until I can have them hemmed properly. Not a fan of the useless pockets below the knee, either. Anything you put in there is going to flop around and be general pain in the ass, so why even bother putting a huge cargo pocket there? a small tight fitting pocket there would have been a better choice, but... Again, useless and stupid.
Box arrived dented but item seems okay so far.

This toy really held my kids' attention during the party. The interactive light feature kept them engaged and entertained even when they were tired of the earlier games. It's a great value for the price and something I'll definitely keep in my toy bin at home.

This book exceeded my expectations in every way. The illustrations and prose felt fresh compared to what I used to see in similar books. It really pulled me back into reading and made me appreciate classic stories even more. The details are polished, and the story flows naturally. A real gem that keeps me coming back. Five stars for quality and visuals!

I really enjoyed this item for its variety and quality. The fabric feels soft and holds up well after cleaning. One thing to note is that some of the pieces ended up a bit smaller than expected, but the fit was still great. It's a solid pick if you want a range of styles without compromising comfort.

This book exceeded my expectations! The paranormal elements are well-written and engaging. I was surprised by how much depth went into the characters, especially Charlotte's journey. It kept me hooked from start to finish and felt fresh compared to other similar reads. A must-read for fans of magical realism.

I fell in love with the illustrations in this book. The Sandman brought this to my son, as a present for sleeping in his own bed the whole night. The story is sweet and it's a good bedtime story. But the real prize here are the beautiful, dreamy pictures throughout.

OMG THE FEELS!!!!! The numbness I felt at the end of book two continued as soon as I started this book. My heart was beating so fast and I had to put the book down a few times, I was so nervous about what was going to happen. This book takes on a serious situation and I thought L.G. Castillo handled it brilliantly. Seeing Cassie deal with what happened was heartbreaking and watching her over come it was empowering. This book had me yelling at both characters and praying that things would finally go right for them. Since I read this on a kindle at 71% I literally had to put the book down and take a moment to recover from what I had read. My heart just couldn't take anymore and the emotions I had, it was overwhelming but I needed to make sure these characters were going to be ok...they needed to be ok! The Story of Cody and Cassie is heartbreaking and beautiful. I can't tell you enough how this book with so few pages can give you so much and make you feel like you read an entire novel with so many feels, good and bad. This series is amazing, she did a phenomenal job telling this story. This is the last book in the Cody and Cassie story and I loved how everything come to a close. This book/series is AMAZING!!!!! I can rant and rave all day!!! I am now eager to read Mandi and Nic's story.

I was a little skeptical about the price bump compared to some of the no-name listings, but after unboxing these I get it. The clarity is spot on, no weird cloudiness or scratches, just clean, crisp crystal that catches light beautifully around the kitchen. I've had cheaper ones before that looked like frosted plastic, so this was a pleasant surprise. Honestly, for what you're paying, the quality feels like a steal. They have a nice weight to them too, not flimsy at all. I've already gotten compliments from guests who thought I spent way more. If you're on the fence, just go with these. Solid value and they actually deliver what the photos promise.

Box arrived looking pretty rough with a corner completely smashed in. Somehow the pieces inside were fine, though a couple of the plastic joints were scuffed up. No instructions included but I figured it out from the listing photos in about twenty minutes. Once built it holds my family's shoes without wobbling, so functionally it does the job. The fabric shelves are thinner than I expected and sag a little under heavier boots. The metal frame actually looks decent for the price but those connectors definitely give it a budget feel. Shipping took the full estimated window which was annoying. It's an okay middle-of-the-road organizer. Wouldn't pay more than thirty bucks for it honestly, but it gets the shoes off the floor for now.
This table is perfect at the beach. Keeps sand from getting on your phone, food or whatever else you put on it. It folds nicely into a canvas bag and stores nicely too. I recommend this product.
This is a great cooler and just the right size for short trips. Coleman still makes good stuff and this is one of them. Nice product and a decent price.
These were a huge success when used these to facilitate writing activities in a youth writing workshop

Went in expecting over-the-top scares, got a solid horror-comedy instead. It's silly, gory, and never takes itself seriously. Perfect for a laid-back movie night when you're not in the mood for genuine tension.

My kids love these soft, bright cars. Each one is a different vehicle in a different color--they are bright appealing and a great little toy. Pull one back and let it go--and it zooms across the floor easily! Thing is, my kids are older than 2 and so a little past the age for this particular toy. So it was perfect when my 1 year old nephew came to visit and we could test drive them with him! Huge success. The lightweight, plush design makes them easy for him to grab and hold onto. He hasn't quite got the zooming thing down yet, but I'm sure he'll get the idea soon enough with my children's avid assistance. My nephew is drooling quite a lot now (teething) so the cars inevitably got coated in drool and later on in banana. That's when the particular cleverness of these really became apparent. The plush tops can be unlatched from the wheel base (just undo the velcro) and washed off without the worry of getting the car mechanism wet. And while these are certainly an appropriate toy for a one year old, I wouldn't likely leave him with the cars without supervision (just in case a wheel could be pried off), but we can take the car base off and let him play with the plush tops all on their own! A great toy, and a great gift. For parents and gift-giving friends who want a toy that's fun but doesn't require batteries and won't send everyone crazy with repeating sounds and lights--this might be just what you're looking for! Happy playing! ^_^ Shanshad

I wanted something lightweight, yet sturdy fabric, and with a zipper. This is perfect because it can lay right in the top of my suitcase and be ready to use the minute I unpack. I use it to hold my smaller size purse, camera, umbrella, jacket, sunglasses, snacks and anything else I might want to carry while traveling about. The three outside pockets are small, but hold hand wipes, tissues and items of which I may want quick access. The straps are wide, and comfortable for my shoulder.

Amazing!!!! Bring on #3. I cant get enough of this series. The way you can literally feel their emotions. The easy flow of the words. The tension..the love...the chase. This is one series I will read over and over again.
Played this dozens of times now and the cards still look new. Shuffles smoothly, no bent corners yet. Fun little strategy game that holds up well.
This is a very good idea! Having the capability to save content from either computer of handheld device is exactly what I had been looking, for! Price is reasonable, as well!
A little slow at times but well worth the money over spending a ton on cable or dish!
The kickstand is surprisingly sturdy and makes hands-free video calls a breeze. I wasn't expecting such solid build quality at this price point.
Fits my Pentax 16-50 lens almost perfectly. It's a trace tight, but it goes on all the way.

For under ten bucks I wasn't expecting much, but these are solid. Tossed a set in my hiking pack and they've handled everything from thick steak to soup without bending. Cleanup's a breeze too. Honestly, you'd pay double for this quality elsewhere.
These were fine. 100 pieces sounded like a lot, but in reality there weren't very many. They are tiny little chips.

Dan Edwardes' introduction to parkour is a well-written and well-organized introduction to parkour, but unfortunately it's too basic and shallow an introduction. I do not think the first instinct of people who are interested in learning about parkour will be to buy a book -- there are too many entertaining youtube videos that offer a sexy taste of what parkour is like. And serious readers won't read this book about parkour -- there isn't any intellectual weight to the book, not enough about parkour's history and the psychology of its adherents. I think the vast majority of people who buy this book (including myself) are novice practitioners looking for a reference book, especially on more complicated movements and proper technique -- and on this front this book sorely disappoints.
Great value and fun! The story really kept me hooked. Highly recommend to anyone into this genre.
Go with your gut for sizing, you'll be better off.

Box arrived a little crushed on one corner but the game cartridge itself was fine, so no harm done there. Shipping was fast, got it two days earlier than expected. When my kid first saw the case he was super excited, the cover art looks fun and colorful. But once we started playing, the packaging charm wore off quick. The game feels way harder than it should be for little ones and there's no gentle intro or forgiving settings, which leads to lots of meltdowns. I get that some kids might enjoy the challenge but for us it was a rough first impression after all that unboxing hype. It's okay, just not the instant hit I hoped for.

I picked this up expecting a steamy second-chance romance, and it mostly delivers. Farrah and Xavier's initial chemistry jumps off the page right from their New York run-in, and the flashbacks to their earlier affair add nice depth without dragging. I liked that Xavier's emotional awakening felt gradual rather than instant, it made his pursuit of Farrah more believable. A few scenes leaned a little heavy on internal monologue, which slowed the pacing for me, but the dialogue between them crackles. Compared to other books in this trope, the heat level is high but balanced with genuine tenderness. It's a solid, satisfying read that kept me engaged, though I wished the ending had a bit more room to breathe. Still, I'd recommend it for a weekend escape.
these shoes are ok but you get what you pay for. they look cheap and are made cheap but if your looking for a shoe to wear briefly or to match an outfit these will do fine.
It held up fine for a few months but the non-stick coating started wearing thin after weekly use. Still works, just not as tough as I hoped.
This flashlight really shines with its bright beam and easy battery changes. Perfect for quick jobs around the house. Would definitely buy again!
A must-read for anyone navigating blended families or second chances at love.

I had compared the dimensions on the site to a fleece jacket I had and the Condor came up a little short (less than 1/2 inch though) in each dimension compared to the fleece dimensions. I ordered the 3X (there is no 4X). It is a nice jacket, I just do not like the way it drapes on the body. The Spandex does not really allow it drape anyway. I am 6 feet plus and about 260 pounds. It does fit snugly but I think it is really the Spandex. If I could relax the Spandex a bit, I would really like this jacket. I love the number of pockets, especially the fore arm pocket. I use it for my ID card. I love the hood with the visor. I wear it to work over a tee shirt and polo shirt normally. I would say it would be comfortable no lower than the high 40s F by itself. You could extend that if you wore a fleece or sweater underneath. It is more comfortable in the 50s F though. I have worn it in some pretty good wind and rain storms. Wind intrusion is not a problem. So far, the rain has not penetrated the material either. The slash pockets are a little high up for me though. It could be an inch or 2 longer in the overall length. It could also be a bit more packable. I wanted it to roll up in the bottom of my work back pack for when I travel. Does not really lend itself to that though.
I wasn't sure what to expect for the money, but the solid feel and clean signal honestly surprised me, way better than the budget import I tried first.
Cute and works (hangs) on anything. I love everything about it.
The metal logo gets really hot as you drink some hot beverages using this cup. You need to be careful. Otherwise, I love the cup.
Great quality lasted through a tough run. Durable and reliable every time.
Great value for small dogs, easy to handle. Perfect choice for my pup. Highly recommended!
Somewhat hard to clean, not as convenient as I had hoped.

This is a fairly nifty multifunction gadget for any golfer, and would make a nice inexpensive gift. As a divot repair tool this is solidly built and works OK. It also has a magnetic ball marker that slides off when you press the bottom of it (it has a 19th hole logo, which you can have replaced with team logos or other options offered by the manufacturer). The top end features an indent to hold a club, just above the magnet designed to catch bottle caps pulled off by the bottle opener (flip it over to use as a can opener). The 6th use of this is to hold cigars, something I would not use myself but which I suppose some golfers may have use for. This tool is nice to have and it is solid, so it should offer many years of use as long as you don't lose it. The shiny gold finish may not last, but while it does it will make the tool stand out in the green. One thing I do suggest is that Amazon place this in the sporting category rather than home goods, where it is currently listed. While it opens bottles and cans, the main purpose is divot repair, which people would search for in sporting goods.
Bought this for my garage workshop and the adjustable tool rests are rock solid. Cuts through rusty bolts like butter. Way better than spending twice as much on a name brand.
Seems to be working. Only been using it for one week.

Great shoes, as expected, as ordered. Not much by way of traction or support, but that's not what I'm looking for - I'm looking for something casual and flexible (not literally, but... that too). These will last me somewhere between 6 and 12 months, which is fair for the miles I will put on them.

First off, you need to realize this has the Coleman name on it and that's it. It has none of the Coleman quality of the 1970's or even 80's. It's made of thin plastic and doesn't feel very solid. It seems to work okay, I just got it and tried it out. If you are thinking this is anywhere near as bright as a Coleman gas lantern, it isn't even close. In a dark kitchen (at night, lights off) it lights up the room, but if you say wanted to read a book comfortably, you would need to be within at least 2 feet of direct level light from this thing. After 3 feet or so bright illumination degrades quickly. The dimmer switch works but feels as if you need to be gentle with it. I woulnd't really recommend this for any real camping due to its construction. On the plus side, it claims a long battery life and the carry handle works well. The light is not blinding when you look directly at the unit, so that is nice for in the house. Provides decent lighting in a home environment if the power were to be out of an extended period. Also, the one I got was a bit scratched up and had some weird dust? in spots on it. They wiped off, but perhaps someone used it already? Who knows, maybe just poor quality control. I ordered through Amazon fulfillment. I bought this in case the power goes out at home, so for that purpose it should be okay. However, if had known it was just a Coleman label on there and none of the quality (clearly made by the same company that makes all other cheap lanterns and badged as Coleman) I would have saved a bunch of money and just purchased a no-name look-a-like with similar results I'm sure.

Love these for our homeschool classroom and use them DAILY! wonderful tools for physical representation of math concepts and even story starters. good quality and tough enough to stand up to 4 kids, one of which being a toddler and one being autistic. Buying more sets soon.
I bought this for my boyfriend. It looks great and seems to be durable and of good quality.
Great chair however the left arm broke off after a few months. I fixed it with gorilla glue. Pretty disappointed in the quality.

This one really saved me money. I needed a simple way to store those leftover wine bottles without worrying about leaks or jostling. The design is clever, just add a stopper and stack them upright, it stays secure. It fits perfectly in my kitchen cabinet and feels solid after just a few uses. Compared to other options, the price is unbeatable. I'm happy with how well it performs and how it saves space. Highly recommend if you're looking for a reliable, affordable storage solution.
My husband loves these. They are comfortable and really nice.

The good news: The headphones work great. The Mic is clear and the buttons are perfectly located for my 68 year old hands. The bad news: They are to small for my big head, if they come down another.250 Inch they would fit perfectly. Because they work and sound so good I will live with.250. Picture the set on a head. There is a very sharp teat on the top left side of the black plastic piece that slides down. I was able to remove them (on both sides) with no problem but it is sharp enough to scratch a small finger.
Does way more than I expected for the price.
Love, love, love Joan Rivers and this book didn't disappoint. Recommended reading if you need to laugh out loud.

Arrived two days early in a compact, no-frills package with all 50 straps neatly bundled together. First impression was solid, the material feels durable and the hook-and-loop grip is surprisingly strong right out of the gate. I tested one on a thick power strip cable and it held firm without slipping. Knocking off a star because the ends fray slightly when you pull them tight. Still, great value for cable management.

The movie contains all of the expected elements of the "Biblical Epic"; just don't expect too many facts. The story as told is interesting and the camera work is at spectacle level. The chariot race (yes, I said "chariot race") has the same nail-biting element as it's name-sake. Smile. Quite enjoyable.
a neat movie.... although I like th newer one better...

I'll admit I mostly bought this because I'm lazy and hate juicing by hand, but the handle grip is what really sold me. It's contoured just right so even when my hands are wet or slippery from citrus oil, I'm not fighting to keep it steady. I've done lemons, limes, even small oranges and the leverage is no joke, seeds stay trapped and pulp barely makes it through. Cleanup is stupid easy too.
Works okay but not great build quality.

If you've got a kid who is building cars in the garage they might be okay putting this together, but I'm thinking it's more for adults, both because the game Destiny is not a kid's game, and because there are some very small parts and somewhat complex instructions. At any rate, I would recommend the builder be at least 10-12 years old depending on skill level. My wife got this and was overjoyed to begin putting it together. She found the instructions a bit frustrating at times, but had it put together in a few days with no help from me, and she's never really done anything like this before so she was surprised that she took to it so well (she really just wanted the finished product but seemed to get really into the building process from my perspective). There are extra parts that come with the model, and the finished product is mighty cool (though a bit subdued in color, but that's Destiny for you). When you are done you'll have a nice block model to display but I wouldn't recommend "playing with it" unless you want to see fragile broken pieces all over your house. Recommended for Destiny fans who are also builders with moderate skill and enjoy assembling models. Worth the price if building models like this is your thing.
Great value and fun! It exceeded what I expected, my kids are actually playing with it every day now. The quality is solid and the design looks cool. Perfect for any room!
Great value! Super easy to use and my pet seems happier too. Highly recommend.
Enjoy the continued story and the way you are drawn into the characters. Good book and look forward to the next one!

My 25 year old tripod broke, so I purchased this. Actually, I liked it so much I purchased two of them and gave one to my father. This is much nicer than my previous tripod. I won't mince words: this book is a complete downer. The first half consists of Eileens diatribe, a scathing attack on her father, herself, her life. But the writing marks Ottessa Moshfegh as an author to watch. Moshfegh gives us a thoroughly dislikeable narrator in the scrawny, shambolic shape of Eileen who has an unspeakable attitude, appalling habits and an entirely dysfunctional relationship with her alcoholic ex-cop father. They live in utter squalor in a town Eileen refers to only as X-ville. She works in the office of a local correctional facility for young male offenders and doesnt have a friend in the worlduntil one day Rebecca walks into the workplace. Beautiful, glamorous, confident Rebecca is everything Eileen is not. But is Rebecca for real? The ominous tone hanging over this story is compounded by the frequent phrases of foreboding generously scattered throughout. I have to say I'm not a fan of this device - it's rather too manipulative of the reader - and as is so often the case, the outcome doesn't quite live up to the suspense nor is the character of Rebecca satisfactorily explained. The book is by no means an easy read in terms of its seedy subject matter but it is, nevertheless, an interesting, fearless and thoughtful piece of work.

I prefer realism over Hollywood story telling. This film is a great "Popcorn" type of War Movie, that in a way reminds me of the old 40's war movies. The plot centers around a tank crew led by Brad Pitt's character "WarDaddy" (right away, when I see a War film with the characters all having nicknames, I know I am in for less than realism and more Hollywoodism). There's a lot to like about this film. It is entertaining, the sound effects are awesome (LOVE LOVE LOVE the.50 cal firing), there's suspense, tension, and afront to innocence brought into a combat scenario. The tactics, movement, command and control structure, and even discipline are all Hollywood screen writers (by that I mean, they are not realistic, but written for the screen to be entertaining). The combat is intense, although a bit too contrived. I think actual combat would've seen the engagements they depict not turn out as depicted. Still, I feel this film is worthy of 4 stars (the only reason I didn't go 5 is because of the realism factor)... I don't feel at all like I wasted my money. I haven't addressed a story synopsis or plot lines because, to be quite honest, I don't want to spoil your viewing (if you've not seen it), and if you have, you know those speak for themselves. I highly recommend this film if you're looking for a really really good war film that will keep you on the edge of your seat. Just don't expect the same level of immersion as other films, such as Platoon, or Saving Pvt. Ryan... I don't think that was the filmakers' aim in making this.

UPDATE #2: As promised, the vendor sent a replacement headset, which does seem to work better. I was also surprised to find this one fits better too as I did NOT expect that. The original headset seems to be too springy (not really a great way to describe it, but the best words I can come up with at the moment), so it is constantly pulling at my ears and coming loose even with slight movement. This one seems to a little loser, so it is more forgiving of head movement. SO, headset #2 seems to have addressed my two biggest complaints about the headset, so I am happy to upgrade the rating to 4 stars instead of the original 1 star rate. Kudos to Patozon for taking the time to make things right! UPDATE: The vendor has reached out to me after this review and they are sending me a replacement headset which I think is awesome. I have bumped this up to a two stat based on the customer service. Once I get the headset, assuming there is improvement in their performance, maybe I can bump it up even higher. I am surprised this headset is so highly rated. I find them to not fit very well and they are constantly falling out of my ears even with the proper ear piece size. That alone would not justify the 1 star rating, but combined with the low sound quality and awful Bluetooth connection, this headset is a huge disappointment. Using a Samsung Galaxy S6, any audio streamed to this device is choppy, in many cases beyond comprehension, unless the phone is about 2 inches from the heaset; even then, sometimes it still doesn't work. I do not have this same issue with other Bluetooth devices paired to this phone. Given the primary function of a headset is to play audio and the fact that this headset doesn't seem to be able to do so warrants a 1 star rating. Wish I knew why some many others have a different experience with this product.

On the plus side, this movie serves up the most beautiful images of Italy. In fact, Italy is the star here. And I completely enjoyed all of the Italian actors who played smaller roles. It's a pleasant, likeable, feel-good movie, and if that seems like damning with faint praise, that's because it is.. Very much a chick flick, which is not a put-down. (And when did movies about relationships, feelings, romance come to be something to sneer at, anyway? ) There are no wizards here, no space aliens, no explosions, no threats to the future of the planet. No violence at all. The actors are all fine and Vanessa Redgrave is, as always, superb. One exception is Christopher Egan, whose performance for most of the movie is over the top, which may be less inept acting than poor direction. That being said, here's the downside: It's going to remind you of a lightweight, made-for-tv romance of the type you can find on the Lifetime or Hallmark channel, just with a bigger budget. The intrusive candy-pop music selections can't help but point you in that direction and make you think that perhaps it's targeted to junior high schoolers. I found myself wondering how Vanessa Redgrave had wandered into a piece of fluff like this. The plot has more potential than substance as presented here and with each new development it's easy to predict what will happen next. No real drama, yet no comedy either. In fact, no tension, no suspense, no surprises, no energy or sizzle. Which is why the best I can say about it is that it's okay. Just okay. But I would have been angry had I spent $10 or $12 to see it in a theater. If you want to see a 'chick flick' that emotionally touches you, inspires you to think, has more than a passing impact, then I suggest you consider The Enchanted April or Mona Lisa Smile or the marvelous German film, Mostly Martha (the original, not the American remake).

Mr. Barzun, has on page 739 attempted to define novels as opposed to tales. He is neither an editor, nor as near as I can determine, a writer of novels. Most of his information about "detective tales" seems to be based on books written in the 1920s. Do not mistake anything he says as being helpful in the writing of a modern novel. Novels, like clothing, come and go in fashion as to their form and content. You may write what he calls a "tale", i.e., the relating of adventures that take for granted motives and settings, but if you pursue that course, you will look long and hard for someone to buy it. The modern reader is interested in motivations, and wants your characters to explain themselves to him/her. Actions and dialog without the subtext is boring, and does nothing to illuminate the human condition for the reader.

My wife is very particular about "her things", and when her tea kettle was starting to rust out, she hinted that she would like a new one for her birthday. So I found this highly reviewed kettle on Amazon and thought it a good deal for many years of service. When my wife received it for her birthday, she was not completely satisfied, but over the past two months she has "gotten used to it". Here are her complaints: 1. Difficulty getting water into it. - with my wife's old kettle, she filled it through the spout. The spout on this kettle is a bit narrower than her old one, so at first water would spill down the side and get the outside wet. She also tried to use the filling lid on top, but the lid has tight tolerances (so steam doesn't escape or rattle around), and the handle doesn't move, so there is no clear path to the pot without getting the outside wet. 2. Difficulty eating water out of it. - as you can see from the picture, the spout protrudes from the upper quarter of the pot. This means she has to hold the kettle at an almost 90 degree angle to pour her hot water, and dousing her hand with a good bit of hot steam. With filling the kettle a bit fuller than she is used to, we are able to get around that problem. Now that she's had two months of kettle ownership, she is much better at aiming water into the kettle, and doesn't have so many problems. She has also noticed that with the flatter and wider bottom of the new kettle, it does heat faster, and it is easier to clean with the nice enameled finish. However, I think next time that we need a new kettle, I'm just going to install a hot water dispenser at the sink.
